Label: N/A
Issue: No section for definitions of terms and units of measure
Correction: Include a section that defines all terms and units of measure used in the document.

Label: Section 4.1
Issue: Does not specify the minimum hardware requirements for running the program
Correction: The system shall require a minimum of 8GB RAM and an Intel i5 processor or equivalent to run the program.

Label: Section 5.1
Issue: Does not specify what happens if the user tries to start inference without selecting a neural network or hardware component
Correction: If the user tries to start inference without selecting a neural network or hardware component, the system shall display an error message indicating the missing selection.

Label: Section 5.2
Issue: Does not specify the behavior if an invalid neural network topology is imported
Correction: If an invalid neural network topology is imported, the system shall display an error message and prevent further actions until a valid topology is imported.

Label: Section 6
Issue: Does not specify the maximum file size for input images
Correction: The system shall support input images up to a maximum file size of 10MB.

Label: Section 7.1
Issue: Scenarios do not cover error handling or recovery procedures
Correction: Include scenarios that describe how the system handles errors and recovers from failures, such as invalid input or hardware disconnection.

Label: Section 8
Issue: Nonfunctional requirements do not specify performance metrics such as response time or throughput
Correction: The system shall have a response time of less than 2 seconds for loading the user interface and a throughput of processing up to 10 images per minute.

Label: Section 8
Issue: Nonfunctional requirements do not specify security measures
Correction: The system shall implement security measures such as user authentication and data encryption to protect user data.

Label: Section 9
Issue: Graphical user interface section does not include accessibility features
Correction: The graphical user interface shall include accessibility features such as screen reader support and keyboard navigation.

Label: Section 10.3
Issue: Error cases do not specify recovery or program state when an error occurs
Correction: If an error occurs, the system shall revert to the previous valid state and display an appropriate error message to the user.
